nodes.context: Organised crime group based in Moss Side, South Manchester, England, involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, robbery, kidnapping, prostitution, extortion, racketeering, murder, money laundering.
Rival gang from South Manchester, formerly known as the Pepperhill Mob, based on the east side of Alexandra Park estate.
Rival gang from South Manchester, a younger Doddington clique.
Rival gang based in Stretford, South Manchester.
Rival gang based in Longsight and Ardwick areas of South Manchester, an offshoot of the Doddington Gang.
Gang from North Manchester, involved in drug trade and gang war with Pepperhill Gang.
Offshoot of the Gooch Close Gang established in 1996 for younger members.

edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch gang had violent disputes with many other South Manchester gangs, most notably The Doddington Gang (formerly known as the Pepperhill Mob)
edges.context: Gooch Close Gang had violent disputes with Doddington Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch gang had violent disputes with many other South Manchester gangs, most notably ... the Moss Side Bloods
edges.context: Gooch Close Gang had violent disputes with Moss Side Bloods.

edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch gang had violent disputes with many other South Manchester gangs, most notably ... the Haydock Close Crew
edges.context: Gooch Close Gang had violent disputes with Haydock Close Crew.

edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch gang had violent disputes with many other South Manchester gangs, most notably ... the Longsight Crew
edges.context: Gooch Close Gang had violent disputes with Longsight Crew.

edges.evidence_quote: The Gooch often bought and sold drugs with the Cheetham Hill Gang. The Gooch had close ties to Cheetham Hill
edges.context: Gooch Close Gang cooperated with Cheetham Hill Gang through drug trade and close ties.

edges.evidence_quote: In the late 1980s and early 1990s, the Pepperhill Gang were involved in a gang war between Moss Side and the Cheetham Hill Gang from North Manchester.
edges.context: Pepperhill Mob was in a gang war with Cheetham Hill Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The Pepperhill Gang declared that nobody from South Manchester was to have dealings with Cheetham Hill. This angered the Gooch and a fierce war erupted
edges.context: Gooch Close Gang and Pepperhill Mob were in a fierce war.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1996, an offshoot gang was identified (Young Gooch)
edges.context: Young Gooch is an offshoot of Gooch Close Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The Young Gooch started to war with the newly emerging Longsight Crew
edges.context: Young Gooch was in conflict with Longsight Crew.

edges.evidence_quote: the newly emerging Longsight Crew, a younger offshoot of the Doddington Gang
edges.context: Longsight Crew is an offshoot of Doddington Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The PBC waged war on the Longsight Crew and the Doddington... but quickly established a truce and alliance with the Gooch.
edges.context: Pit Bull Crew initially fought Gooch but later allied with them.

edges.evidence_quote: The PBC waged war on the Longsight Crew and the Doddington
edges.context: Pit Bull Crew was in conflict with Longsight Crew.

edges.evidence_quote: The PBC waged war on the Longsight Crew and the Doddington
edges.context: Pit Bull Crew was in conflict with Doddington Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The LSSS (L triple S) were originally a faction of the Longsight Crew, but they became disillusioned after a dispute escalated to tit-for-tat shootings.
edges.context: Longsight Street Soldiers were originally a faction of Longsight Crew but later became hostile.

edges.evidence_quote: Subsequently, the LSSS allied themselves with the Gooch/PBC side
edges.context: Longsight Street Soldiers allied with Gooch Close Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: began a violent dispute with the Longsight Crew and the Doddington Gang
edges.context: Longsight Street Soldiers were in conflict with Doddington Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: RCG members claimed affiliation with the Gooch through friendship and family ties

edges.evidence_quote: The other FMD members were subsequently drawn into gang culture, allying themselves with the Gooch
edges.context: Fallowfield Mandem allied with Gooch Close Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: inheriting their war with Doddington and Longsight

edges.evidence_quote: On 27 July 2007, Tyrone Gilbert, 23, was gunned down by members of the Gooch and Longsight Street Soldiers
edges.context: Gooch and Longsight Street Soldiers jointly carried out the murder of Tyrone Gilbert.

edges.evidence_quote: Braithwaite was associated with the Fallowfield Mad Dogs (FMD), a younger Gooch-aligned crew.
edges.context: Fallowfield Mad Dogs were aligned with the Gooch Close Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: This murder was carried out by younger Gooch factions; Moses "Mojo" Mathias of the Young Gooch Close Gang, Njabulo Ndlovu of the Old Trafford Cripz and Hiruy Zerihun of the Fallowfield Mad Dogs
edges.context: Old Trafford Cripz cooperated with Gooch factions in the murder of Giuseppe Gregory.

edges.evidence_quote: Police investigations linked his murder to an escalating feud between two Gooch and Doddington splinter gangs: AO/Moss Side Bloods and Mossway/Rusholme Crips.
edges.context: Mossway/Rusholme Crips are a splinter of Gooch and Doddington, involved in a feud with AO/Moss Side Bloods.

edges.evidence_quote: Police investigations linked his murder to an escalating feud between two Gooch and Doddington splinter gangs: AO/Moss Side Bloods and Mossway/Rusholme Crips.
edges.context: AO/Moss Side Bloods and Mossway/Rusholme Crips were in a feud.

edges.evidence_quote: Halton was wrongly presumed to be a Haydock Close Crew member, a Doddington faction based in Stretford
edges.context: Haydock Close Crew is a faction of the Doddington Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: He was ambushed by members of a younger faction of the Longsight Crew near his home and killed by a shotgun blast. His death was part of a vicious feud between the FMD (who wore blue and were tied to Gooch) and the newer "L-Town" faction of the Longsight Crew
edges.context: Fallowfield Mad Dogs were in a feud with the Longsight Crew's L-Town faction.

edges.evidence_quote: Gary Mullings, 30, was killed with a knife during a botched armed robbery in Old Trafford. Mullings had been a longtime Manchester gang member
edges.context: No direct relationship stated between Gooch and Rusholme Crew; only co-occurrence.
